languages.text: "Вигдис, направьте авгуры на регион, где были обнаружены сигналы".
"Vigdis, direct the augurs to the region where the signals were detected."
languages.original_text: "Вигдис, направьте авгуры на регион, где были обнаружены сигналы".

traits.locale_text: "Vigdis, direct the augurs to the region where the signals were detected."
"Vigdis, direct the augurs to the region where the signals were detected."
"Vigdis, direct the augurs to the region where the signals were detected."

languages.text: 「ヴィグディス、占星術師を信号が検知された地域に派遣せよ」
languages.original_text: "Vigdis, direct the augurs to the region where the signals were detected."

languages.text: "Alametleri sinyallerin tespit edildiği bölgeye yönlendir Vigdis."
languages.original_text: "Vigdis, direct the augurs to the region where the signals were detected."

traits.locale_text: "Alametleri sinyallerin tespit edildiği bölgeye yönlendir Vigdis."

languages.text: “维格迪斯，将俄歇矩阵对准信号侦测区域。”
languages.original_text: "Vigdis, direct the augurs to the region where the signals were detected."

traits.locale_text: “维格迪斯，将俄歇矩阵对准信号侦测区域。”

languages.text: "Vigdis, richtet die Auguren auf die Region, aus der die Signale kamen."
languages.original_text: "Vigdis, direct the augurs to the region where the signals were detected."

traits.locale_text: "Vigdis, richtet die Auguren auf die Region, aus der die Signale kamen."

languages.text: « Vigdis, orientez les augures vers la région où les signaux ont été détectés. »
languages.original_text: "Vigdis, direct the augurs to the region where the signals were detected."

traits.locale_text: « Vigdis, orientez les augures vers la région où les signaux ont été détectés. »

languages.text: «Vigdis, dirija a los augures hacia la región donde se detectaron las señales».
languages.original_text: "Vigdis, direct the augurs to the region where the signals were detected."

traits.locale_text: «Vigdis, dirija a los augures hacia la región donde se detectaron las señales».
